---
title: "On Academics and Bridging the Gap"
description: "Academics can change the world – if they stop talking only to their peers"
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: 03-11-2016
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: https://62e528761d0685343e1c-f3d1b99a743ffa4142d9d7f1978d9686.ssl.cf2.rackcdn.com/files/114045/width668/image-20160307-30506-480t7q.jpg
categories:
  - links
  - academic
---

[LINK](https://theconversation.com/academics-can-change-the-world-if-they-stop-talking-only-to-their-peers-55713)

I guess this is the main problem that my blog aims to solve. There is so much beauty and insight hanging out in journals and research papers but very little actually makes it into where it matters - the public.

Great read! Allot 3 minutes.
